title: fortnite klombo [cobblemon]
description: the datapack add the klombo to cobblemon
body:
This data pack adds klombo and baby klombo to cobblemon, they spawn in the forest

baby klombo can be evolved into klombo at level 17

### **how to install**

When downloading the datapack add the .zip to the "resorcepacks" folder and to the "datapacks" folder in the world


![klombo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71ce9a410c40a554ed490a710eb7c72868729766.png)
